summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance meeting/appointment scheduling feature completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend features verified working. Fixed 1 bug: Missing 'X' icon import in Admin.jsx causing runtime error.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend MeetingCreate model correctly validates title, date, time, duration_minutes, is_recurring, recurrence fields
Backend admin_create_meeting creates notification for user when meeting is scheduled
Backend admin_cancel_meeting sets status to 'cancelled' instead of deleting (soft delete pattern)
Backend get_my_meetings correctly filters by status='scheduled' and date >= today
Frontend Admin.jsx Reuniones tab correctly displays meetings with edit/cancel buttons
Frontend Profile.jsx buildGoogleCalendarUrl correctly generates Google Calendar URL with action=TEMPLATE, text, dates, details parameters
Frontend Profile.jsx correctly shows upcoming meetings next to profile photo with 'Agregar a Google Calendar' link
seed_data_creation: Test users and meetings created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting scheduling feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings (create), GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings (list), PUT /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} (update), DELETE /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} (cancel), GET /api/meetings (user's upcoming). Frontend: Admin panel has Reuniones tab with Agendar button, meeting dialog with all fields, edit/cancel buttons on meetings. Profile page shows upcoming meetings with Google Calendar link. Fixed missing X icon import in Admin.jsx.

backend_create_meeting.details: Admin can create meetings with title, description, date, time, duration, recurrence. Creates notification for user.

backend_get_user_meetings.details: Admin can retrieve all meetings for a user sorted by date.

backend_update_meeting.details: Admin can update meeting title, date, time, duration, recurrence. Creates notification for user.

backend_cancel_meeting.details: Admin can cancel meeting (sets status to 'cancelled'). Creates notification for user.

backend_user_meetings.details: User can get their upcoming scheduled meetings (excludes cancelled, past dates).

frontend_admin_reuniones_tab.details: Reuniones tab exists in user detail panel, shows meeting count.

frontend_admin_agendar_button.details: Agendar button opens meeting dialog with all required fields.

frontend_admin_meeting_dialog.details: Meeting dialog has title, description, date, time, duration, recurrence fields.

frontend_admin_edit_cancel_buttons.details: Edit and cancel buttons appear on scheduled meetings.

frontend_profile_meetings.details: Upcoming meetings appear next to profile photo with Google Calendar link.

frontend_google_calendar_url.details: Google Calendar URL correctly generated with action=TEMPLATE, text, dates, details parameters.

tests_passed: Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings creates meeting successfully
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings creates recurring weekly meeting
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings creates monthly recurring meeting
Backend: Non-admin cannot create meetings (403)
Backend: Cannot create meeting for non-existent user (404)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/meetings returns meetings list
Backend: Non-admin cannot access admin meetings endpoint (403)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} updates title
Backend: PUT /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} updates time and date
Backend: PUT /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} updates recurrence
Backend: Cannot update non-existent meeting (404)
Backend: Cannot update meeting with empty body (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id} cancels meeting
Backend: Cannot cancel non-existent meeting (404)
Backend: GET /api/meetings returns upcoming scheduled meetings
Backend: GET /api/meetings excludes cancelled meetings
Backend: Unauthenticated cannot get meetings (401)
Backend: Meeting has all required fields
Backend: Meeting notification created when scheduled
Frontend: Admin page loads without errors
Frontend: Reuniones tab exists and is clickable
Frontend: Agendar button opens meeting dialog
Frontend: Meeting dialog has all required fields
Frontend: Edit buttons present on scheduled meetings
Frontend: Cancel buttons present on scheduled meetings
Frontend: Profile page shows upcoming meetings
Frontend: Google Calendar link present and correctly formatted

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'X' icon import from lucide-react causing 'X is not defined' runtime error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'X' to the lucide-react import statement
